objective: Cycle 24 — Wire BiomeRadial selector + faction dashboard + biome-key passthrough
checkpoint: Wire BiomeRadial: _on_partir_pressed() now opens radial selector (was hardcoded to foret_broceliande). Players can finally choose from all 8 biomes with maturity gating. Faction dashboard: CRT-styled PanelContainer below chronicle header with 5 faction ProgressBars (DRU/ANC/KOR/NIA/ANK, color-coded per faction_* CRT_PALETTE), tier letters (H=80+/S=50+/N=20+/X=<20), Anam diamond counter, Runes ogham counter. Signal-driven via reputation_changed. Responsive layout (88% mobile, 55% desktop). BroceliandeForest3D: reads biome_key from MerlinStore.run.current_biome at _ready(). Bug fixes: initial _layout_all() call (dashboard was at 0,0 until resize), BIOME_DATA := to Dictionary type hint. Code review: 2 bugs found and fixed (CRITICAL: missing initial layout, HIGH: := type inference). 2 files modified, 178 lines. 31 bugs fixed across 24 cycles.
